finding_results.notes: Rebuilt the confrontation into shorter, interruptive turns with clearer overlap and leverage shifts. In the revised 99-167 band, no speaker turn runs beyond three sentences without a beat; pressure markers/self-cutoffs are present in-line (e.g., lines 99, 131, 153). Gloria remains procedural-command driven; Marisol remains high-contraction, confrontational, and image-stressed.
finding_results.summary: Monologue-like exchange converted to pressured, voice-separated confrontation with interruptions and cadence variation while preserving scene facts and stakes.

summary: Addressed the single dialogue-cadence finding by tightening the Marisol-Gloria confrontation into interruptive, high-pressure turns that preserve continuity and character idiolect.
